note: Translations below are the public-domain Yusuf Ali rendering. Please have these verified by a qualified scholar before broadcasting publicly — Claude cannot certify religious accuracy.

quran.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ كَانَتْ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ كِتَابًا مَوْقُوتًا
quran.translation: Verily, prayer is enjoined on believers at stated times.
And be steadfast in prayer and give the zakat.
Guard strictly your prayers, especially the middle prayer.
Seek help through patience and prayer.

hadith.text: The first matter that a servant will be brought to account for on the Day of Judgment is prayer.
Prayer is the pillar of religion.
hadith.source: Widely cited tradition — please verify chain before broadcast

hadith.text: The closest a servant comes to his Lord is when he is prostrating, so make much supplication there.
